assumptions: The question concerns consolidated financial statements under IFRS.
The intragroup dividends have given rise to a recognised intragroup receivable/payable and an associated foreign currency exposure.

approaches.label: Fair value hedge accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies fair value hedge accounting as a top-level hedge accounting model for recognised assets or liabilities and other eligible hedged items.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies cash flow hedge accounting as a distinct hedge accounting model for forecast transactions and other variability in cash flows of eligible hedged items.

approaches.label: Net investment hedge accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 and IFRIC 16 identify hedges of a net investment in a foreign operation as a separate hedge accounting model for foreign currency risk in consolidation.
